widget.name: Ax MUI Table
widget.description: Render a datasource as a MUI table with sorting, selection, and pagination.
widget.prompt: Add a datasource-backed MUI table with grouped headers, sorting, selection, and pagination.

property.caption: Data source
property.description: Datasource providing the row objects shown in the table.
property.prompt: Provides the list of row objects displayed in the table.

property.caption: Selection
property.description: Optional Mendix selection binding for the currently selected rows.
property.prompt: Connect this when selected rows must be available to other widgets or actions.

property.caption: Selected keys attribute
property.description: Optional string attribute that stores selected row IDs as JSON.

property.caption: Title
property.description: Optional title displayed above the table.

property.caption: Sticky header
property.description: Keep the table header fixed while the table body scrolls.

property.caption: Table height
property.description: Height in pixels used for sticky header and virtual scroll modes.

property.caption: Dense
property.description: Use dense padding for table cells.

property.caption: Pagination mode
property.description: Choose traditional paging, load more, or no pagination.

property.caption: Default page number
property.description: Starting page number used on initial render.

property.caption: Page size
property.description: Number of rows loaded per page or batch.

property.caption: Show size changer
property.description: Allow users to change the page size from within the pagination controls.

property.caption: Show row count
property.description: Display the current row range and total row count when available.

property.caption: Selection method
property.description: Choose checkboxes, radios, or row-click selection.

property.caption: Show select all
property.description: Show the select-all checkbox when multi-selection uses checkboxes.

property.caption: Keep selection
property.description: Preserve selected rows when paging, sorting, or refreshing changes the visible rows.

property.caption: Fixed columns
property.description: Fixed column definitions bound directly to attributes on the row datasource entity.

property.caption: Column key
property.description: Stable key for the column.

property.caption: Caption
property.description: Header caption for the column.

property.caption: Group key
property.description: Optional key used to group columns under one header.

property.caption: Group caption
property.description: Caption shown for the grouped header.

property.caption: Visible
property.description: Hide or show this column.

property.caption: Cell render type
property.description: Choose between attribute formatting, dynamic text, or a clickable link.

property.caption: Attribute value
property.description: Datasource attribute shown in the cell and used for sorting when enabled.

property.caption: Dynamic text value
property.description: Datasource-linked text template shown in the cell.

property.caption: Link caption
property.description: Caption for link cells. Falls back to dynamic text or attribute value when empty.

property.caption: Link action
property.description: Action executed when the link cell is clicked.

property.caption: Allow row events
property.description: Allow row click and selection to continue when the user interacts with the cell content.

property.caption: Sortable
property.description: Enable remote sorting for this column when its attribute allows sorting.

property.caption: Alignment
property.description: Align the column header and cells.

property.caption: Width
property.description: Preferred column width in pixels.

property.caption: Ellipsis
property.description: Truncate overflowing cell text with ellipsis.

property.caption: Dynamic columns
property.description: Each entry defines a set of dynamic columns driven by its own datasource. All column-descriptor and cell-value mappings are bundled in one place.

property.caption: Columns source
property.description: Datasource providing the column descriptor objects for this set.

property.caption: Cells JSON attribute
property.description: String attribute on each row containing a JSON object with cell values keyed by column key.

property.caption: Column key
property.description: Unique key for each column descriptor item.

property.caption: Column title
property.description: Header title for each column descriptor item.

property.caption: Value key
property.description: JSON property name to look up the cell value. Defaults to the column key when empty.

property.caption: Group key
property.description: Optional grouped-header key.

property.caption: Group title
property.description: Optional grouped-header title.

property.caption: Visible
property.description: Boolean expression controlling whether this column is shown.

property.caption: Width
property.description: Integer expression for the preferred column width in pixels.

property.caption: Align
property.description: Column alignment: left, center, or right.

property.caption: Order
property.description: Integer expression controlling the display order of this column. Lower values appear first; columns without an order value follow at the end.

property.caption: On row click
property.description: Action executed when a row is single-clicked.

property.caption: On row double click
property.description: Action executed when a row is double-clicked.

property.caption: On selection changed
property.description: Action executed after the widget updates the Mendix selection property.
